title: Gypsy → SiftStack Probate Migration Plan
summary: Operational cutover plan migrating manual daily probate/foreclosure data collection (Gypsy) to SiftStack's 6 AM automated cron over a phased 3-week rollout.
notes: Manifest-declared PRD confirmed by content: phased user-facing checklists, success metrics table with measurable targets (≥95% PR recall, ≤1 miss/week, ≥80% Tier-1 connect, ≤30min/week operator overhead), explicit rollback triggers, and goals/non-goals framing. No ADR/SPEC signals present.
